creator: m@kappa.st
text:
Hi,
 
 patch approved. 
 
 Second master site http://download.gna.org/kanicule/freebsd/distfiles/ has been 
 updated with the new tarball.
 
 Cheers,
 Mathias
 
 On Mon, Jun 09, 2008 at 08:48:25PM +0800, chinsan wrote:
 > 
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	chinsan
 > >Organization:	Taiwan
 > >Confidential:	no 
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] www/glpi: Update to 0.70.2 
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports 
 > >Class:		change-request
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE i386
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD chinsan.info 7.0-STABLE FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE #2: Mon Apr 21 11:50:08 CST 2008
 > >Description:
 > - Update to 0.70.2
 > 
 > Port maintainer (mathias@monnerville.com) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 > 
 > --- glpi-0.70.2.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/www/glpi/Makefile /usr/home/chinsan/projects/glpi/Makefile
 > --- /usr/ports/www/glpi/Makefile	2008-04-21 01:37:58.000000000 +0800
 > +++ /usr/home/chinsan/projects/glpi/Makefile	2008-06-09 18:29:43.000000000 +0800
 > @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

 >  
 >  PORTNAME=	glpi
 > -DISTVERSION=	0.70.1a
 > +DISTVERSION=	0.70.2
 >  CATEGORIES=	www
 >  MASTER_SITES=	http://glpi-project.org/IMG/gz/ \
 >  		http://download.gna.org/kanicule/freebsd/distfiles/
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/www/glpi/distinfo /usr/home/chinsan/projects/glpi/distinfo
 > --- /usr/ports/www/glpi/distinfo	2008-04-21 01:37:58.000000000 +0800
 > +++ /usr/home/chinsan/projects/glpi/distinfo	2008-06-09 18:32:23.000000000 +0800
 > @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

 > -SIZE (glpi-0.70.1a.tar.gz) = 1737630
